calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-22-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Precision Risk Management, Inc.
Order waiving live testimony in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Thomas W. Todt as follows:
Damages $32,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $13,403.62
Costs $318.00, for a total of $45,721.62
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-30-2005 Continued To Sep-22-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
